title: Dose Response Assay Environment v0
summary: A dry-run research environment where an agent designs, executes, QC-checks, repairs, and reports a 96-well dose-response assay with traceable evidence.

target_users: model teams seeking stateful scientific environments
research_value.practical_value: The environment packages a real research workflow shape: plate-map design, dilution planning, dry-run transfer execution, plate-reader output, QC, curve fitting, repair, and evidence export. A lab can use the same shape to preflight agent-operated assays before live instruments.
research_value.community_artifact: A reusable open reference environment for agent-operated dose-response assays over PyLabRobot-like or scheduler-backed substrates.
non_toy_signals: The task has a scientific endpoint, not only device commands.
The verifier checks assay-level outcomes: controls, replicates, dose ordering, readout QC, and IC50 evidence.
The environment contains repairable failures that mirror real lab mistakes: stale deck state, insufficient reagent volume, overwritten controls, invalid dilution series, and failed plate-reader QC.
Run exports include state diffs, command logs, readout artifacts, QC tables, curve-fit outputs, and verifier results.

substrates.name: pylabrobot_reference_backend
substrates.role: Open reference backend for deck resources, tips, well volumes, and dry-run liquid handling.
substrates.boundary: Use simulation, Chatterbox, or serialized state only. Do not connect to live robots or hardware backends.

substrates.name: plate_reader_readout_fixture
substrates.role: Deterministic absorbance or viability readout table for final assay analysis.
substrates.boundary: Fixture-generated readouts only; no live plate reader calls.

substrates.name: assay_analysis_backend
substrates.role: Computes QC summaries and a dose-response result from accepted readout wells.
substrates.boundary: Use deterministic local analysis with explicit inputs and no hidden model calls.

state_model.name: deck_revision
state_model.description: Revision token for deck, labware, sample, and reagent state. Mutating actions must cite the current revision.

state_model.name: plate_map
state_model.description: Agent-visible assay plate role assignments: compound doses, replicates, positive controls, negative controls, blank wells, and excluded wells.

state_model.name: sample_and_reagent_ledger
state_model.description: Current source volumes, reagent identities, compound stock concentration, and destination well volumes.

state_model.name: tip_and_contamination_ledger
state_model.description: Tip inventory, mounted tip state, and sample-to-tip contamination lineage.

state_model.name: readout_artifacts
state_model.description: Plate-reader output files, parsed well values, excluded wells, and QC result ids.

state_model.name: hidden_expected_resolution
state_model.description: Seeded expected assay invariants used only by the verifier.

action_surface.name: inspect_assay_state
action_surface.description: Inspect deck revision, labware, available samples, reagents, tips, and current plate-map state.

action_surface.name: propose_plate_map
action_surface.description: Submit a candidate dose-response plate map with doses, replicates, controls, and blanks.
action_surface.effects: Stores the proposed plate map if it is structurally valid.

action_surface.name: run_transfer_dry
action_surface.description: Execute a dry-run transfer plan against the current sample, reagent, tip, and plate state.
action_surface.effects: Mutates dry-run volumes, tip state, contamination lineage, and action log.

action_surface.name: read_plate_dry
action_surface.description: Generate a deterministic dry-run readout artifact for the current assay plate.
action_surface.effects: Writes a readout artifact and parsed values for downstream QC.

action_surface.name: run_assay_qc
action_surface.description: Evaluate controls, replicate consistency, dose ordering, missing data, and excluded wells.
action_surface.effects: Writes a QC artifact and machine-readable pass/fail reasons.

action_surface.name: fit_dose_response
action_surface.description: Compute the final dose-response result from QC-accepted wells only.
action_surface.effects: Writes curve-fit output and summary metrics.

action_surface.name: submit_assay_report
action_surface.description: Submit the final assay decision with plate map, transfer, readout, QC, and curve-fit evidence ids.
action_surface.effects: Stores the final report for hidden verification.

observations.name: assay_state_observation
observations.description: Agent-visible summary of deck revision, labware, source volumes, tip inventory, controls, and current artifacts.

observations.name: repairable_error_observation
observations.description: Stable error code, state references, and repair instruction returned after invalid environment actions.

observations.name: qc_summary_observation
observations.description: Agent-visible QC pass/fail summary with evidence ids and rejected wells.

observations.name: hidden_resolution_observation
observations.description: Seed-specific expected final invariants used only by the verifier.

verifier_checks.name: dry_run_no_live_action
verifier_checks.description: No live hardware backend, scheduler run, device endpoint, or plate reader call occurred.

verifier_checks.name: current_revision_used
verifier_checks.description: Every mutating action cited the current deck revision and stale evidence was not accepted.

verifier_checks.name: plate_map_satisfies_assay_design
verifier_checks.description: The final plate map includes required doses, replicates, blanks, positive controls, and negative controls.

verifier_checks.name: liquid_state_feasible
verifier_checks.description: Source volumes, destination capacities, transfer volumes, and final well volumes are feasible.

verifier_checks.name: tip_policy_and_contamination_clean
verifier_checks.description: Fresh-tip and no-cross-contamination policies were followed for all sample and compound transfers.

verifier_checks.name: readout_after_valid_execution
verifier_checks.description: Readout was generated only after a valid dry-run transfer plan produced a ready assay plate.

verifier_checks.name: qc_accepts_required_controls
verifier_checks.description: Control wells and replicate statistics passed the seeded QC thresholds.

verifier_checks.name: curve_fit_uses_accepted_wells_only
verifier_checks.description: Dose-response result was computed from QC-accepted wells and cites the correct QC artifact.

verifier_checks.name: final_report_cites_traceable_evidence
verifier_checks.description: Final report cites plate map, dry-run transfer log, readout, QC, curve-fit artifact, and decision rationale.

evidence_exports.name: state_diff_trace
evidence_exports.description: Per-action state revisions and diffs for deck, volumes, tips, artifacts, and report state.

evidence_exports.name: transfer_log
evidence_exports.description: Dry-run transfer commands, source/destination wells, volumes, tips, and failure records.

evidence_exports.name: readout_artifact
evidence_exports.description: Machine-readable plate-reader-style output and parsed well values.

evidence_exports.name: qc_artifact
evidence_exports.description: Control, replicate, dose ordering, exclusion, and pass/fail QC results.

evidence_exports.name: curve_fit_artifact
evidence_exports.description: Dose-response fit inputs, accepted wells, fitted parameters, and result summary.

evidence_exports.name: run_export
evidence_exports.description: API Gym evidence export containing task, tool trace, verifier result, and artifact paths.

scenarios.name: eight_point_viability_ic50
scenarios.objective: Prepare and analyze an 8-point viability dose-response assay and submit an IC50 report with evidence.
scenarios.agent_task: Design the plate map, execute the dry-run transfer plan, generate a plate readout, run QC, fit the dose-response curve, repair any environment rejections, and submit a final evidence-backed report.
scenarios.practical_use: A researcher can test whether an agent can operate a full assay workflow before trusting it with a scheduler or live automation platform.
required_state: compound stock concentration and available volume
cell plate or assay plate layout
success_criteria: 8-point dose series with required replicates is present
positive, negative, and blank controls are preserved
all liquid transfers are feasible and respect tip policy
readout occurs after valid dry-run execution
QC passes for required controls and accepted wells
IC50 result is computed from QC-accepted wells only
final report cites traceable evidence artifacts
expected_repairs: recompute transfer plan after stale deck revision
change plate map when controls would be overwritten
reduce or redistribute transfers when source volume is insufficient
rerun QC after replacing invalid readout evidence
